description: Capability set for the dm-banner custom notification window. Receives the DM payload via IPC (core:event) and invokes banner_window_ready (ready-handshake show), banner_action (re-emit notification:dm-action → App.svelte opens detail / copies prompt), and dismiss_banner (auto-timeout / close). Without this file the banner's invoke()/listen calls silently fail the capability check and the window (created visible:false, shown only by the handshake) never appears. Mirrors dm-detail.json.
